entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 2
entries.excerpt: Having finished the account of the creation on the sixth day of the creeping things, cattle, beasts, and man, and of their blessing by God, Moses writes that God rested on the seventh day, and says: “Thus the heavens and the earth were finished, and all the host of them… And on the seventh day God ended his work which he had made, and he rested on the seventh day from all his work which he had made” (Gen 2:1–2). After what toil did God rest?…
